basic_details.job_title: Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 70 Clerk/Typist, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy Manager, Assistant Manager, Banking Officer & Clerk/Typist
basic_details.short_information: Jalna District Central Cooperative Bank Limited (Jalna DCC Bank) has released a recruitment notification for various posts in 2026. The bank invites online applications from eligible candidates for Deputy Manager, Assistant Manager, Banking Officer and Clerk/Typist posts.

application_fee.details: Application fee details will be updated as per the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Jalna DCC Bank Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Jalna District Central Cooperative Bank has announced vacancies for various banking positions. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualification and experience can apply for different posts. The eligibility details are given below: Deputy Manager: Candidates should have Post Graduation in Commerce / CA / MBA Finance / M.Sc Computer / M.E Computer with minimum 50% marks along with MS-CIT or equivalent certification. Minimum 7 years banking sector experience is required. Assistant Manager: Candidates should have Post Graduation in Commerce / CA / MBA Finance / M.Sc Computer / M.E Computer with minimum 50% marks along with MS-CIT or equivalent certification. Minimum 5 years experience is required. Banking Officer No.1: Candidates should have relevant Post Graduation qualification with minimum 50% marks along with MS-CIT or equivalent certification. Minimum 3 years banking experience is required. Banking Officer No.2: Candidates should have Graduation/Post Graduation in any discipline with minimum 50% marks and MS-CIT or equivalent certification. Banking experience is required. Clerk / Typist: Candidates should have Graduation/Post Graduation in any discipline and MS-CIT or equivalent certification.

content_sections.heading: Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Deputy Manager: 21 to 45 Years Assistant Manager: 21 to 40 Years Banking Officer No.1: 21 to 40 Years (Reserved Categories up to 45 Years) Banking Officer No.2: 21 to 38 Years (Reserved Categories up to 43 Years) Clerk / Typist: 21 to 38 Years (Reserved Categories up to 43 Years)

content_sections.heading: Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details will be updated as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of Jalna DCC Bank?
faq.answer: Jalna DCC Bank stands for Jalna District Central Cooperative Bank Limited, Jalna.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 70 vacancies for various posts.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available in Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts include Deputy Manager, Assistant Manager, Banking Officer No.1, Banking Officer No.2 and Clerk/Typist.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website of Jalna District Central Cooperative Bank.

faq.question: Q5. What is the starting date to apply for Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to apply online for Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 18 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the qualification required for Jalna DCC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should have Graduation/Post Graduation or other required qualifications depending on the post. MS-CIT or equivalent computer certification is also required for applicable posts.
